ail: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Aimele.
ain: symbol. ISO 639-2 & ISO 639-3 language code for Ainu.
algid: adjective. Cold, chilly; used of low body temperature, especially in connection with certain diseases such as malaria and cholera.
algin: noun. Any of various gelatinous gums, derivatives of alginic acid, derived from marine brown algae and used especially as emulsifiers or
align: verb. To form a line; to fall into line.
and: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Ansus.
ani: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Andi.
anil: noun. The indigo shrub; or the indigo dye obtained from the plant.
dag: symbol. Symbol for decagram, an SI unit of mass equal to 10 grams.
dah: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Gwahatike.
dal: symbol. Symbol for decalitre, an SI unit of fluid measure equal to 10 litres.
dial: noun. A graduated, circular scale over which a needle moves to show a measurement (such as speed).
ding: noun. Very minor damage caused by being struck; a small dent or chip.

gadi: noun. A cushioned throne used by Indian princes.
gan: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Gan.
gid: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Gidar.

glia: noun. The network of glial cells that supports nervous system tissue.

hading: verb. present participle and gerund of hade
hag: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Hanga.
handing: verb. present participle and gerund of hand
handling: noun. A touching, controlling, managing, using, taking care of, etc., with the hand or hands, or as with the hands.
hang: verb. To be or remain suspended.
hin: symbol. ISO 639-2 & ISO 639-3 language code for Hindi.
hind: adjective. Located at the rear (most often said of animals' body parts).
inland: adjective. Within the land; relatively remote from the ocean or from open water; interior.
inn: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Isinai.
lad: symbol. ISO 639-2 & ISO 639-3 language code for Ladino.
lag: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Langi.

landing: noun. An arrival at a surface, as of an airplane or any descending object.

lid: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Nyindrou.
ligand: noun. A molecule or moiety (ion, functional group, or radical) that binds to another chemical entity to form a larger complex; as,
lin: symbol. ISO 639-2 & ISO 639-3 language code for Lingala.
ling: noun. Any of various codlike saltwater fish often used as food by humans, those of the genus Molva, in the family Lotidae.
linn: noun. A waterfall or cataract (torrent of water running over a rocky bed), or a ravine down which such a waterfall rushes.
nag: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Naga Pidgin.
nah: symbol. ISO 639-2 & ISO 639-5 language code for Nahuan languages.
nail: noun. The thin, horny plate at the ends of fingers and toes on humans, chimpanzees and some other animals.
nan: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Min Nan.
nidal: adjective. Of or pertaining to nests.
nil: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Nila.
